title: Working Memory, Durable Memory, Write Admission, Provenance, and Poisoning Defense · Behavior Case: Memory Kind Lifetime

"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-memory-kind-lifetime — Distinguish in-turn state, session memory, user preferences, task facts, organizational knowledge, examples, and audit records by owner and lifetime.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-memory-policy-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-memory-policy-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_memory_policy_5(memory_candidates: int = 30, admitted_memories: int = 12, rejected_memories: int = 18, provenance_records: int = 30, cross_tenant_leaks: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if memory_candidates < 1 or admitted_memories < 0 or rejected_memories < 0:
        return False, memory_candidates, "memory-count"
    if admitted_memories + rejected_memories != memory_candidates:
        return False, admitted_memories, "memory-reconciliation"
    if provenance_records != memory_candidates:
        return False, provenance_records, "memory-provenance"
    if cross_tenant_leaks > 0:
        return False, cross_tenant_leaks, "tenant-memory-leak"
    assert admitted_memories + rejected_memories == memory_candidates and cross_tenant_leaks == 0
    return True, admitted_memories, "provenance-gated-memory"

# Case 8658: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_memory_kind_lifetime_19u5mb(memory_candidates: int = 30, admitted_memories: int = 12, rejected_memories: int = 18, provenance_records: int = 30, cross_tenant_leaks: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_19u5mb = "19u5mb-bm5u91-8658"
    assert evidence_variant_19u5mb
    evidence_axes_19u5mb = (
        "authority19u5mb",
        "interaction8658",
        "toolbm5u91",
        "state19u5mb8658",
        "evaluation865819u5mb",
        "recoverybm5u918658",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_19u5mb)) == 6
    if memory_candidates < 1 or admitted_memories < 0 or rejected_memories < 0:
        return False, memory_candidates, "memory-count"
    if admitted_memories + rejected_memories != memory_candidates:
        return False, admitted_memories, "memory-reconciliation"
    if provenance_records != memory_candidates:
        return False, provenance_records, "memory-provenance"
    if cross_tenant_leaks > 0:
        return False, cross_tenant_leaks, "tenant-memory-leak"
    assert admitted_memories + rejected_memories == memory_candidates and cross_tenant_leaks == 0
    return True, admitted_memories, "provenance-gated-memory"
